pages.text:
U.S. DEPARTMENT OF STATE

Depositary Notification

Notification Reference No. 2024-081

The Antarctic Treaty

Done at Washington on December 1, 1959

United Arab Emirates: Accession

Date of Action: December 11, 2024

The Secretary of State, in performance of the depositary duties of the United States of America, communicates the following:

On December 11, 2024, the United Arab Emirates deposited an instrument of accession to the Antarctic

Treaty.

The Antarctic Treaty, in accordance with Article XIII, paragraph 5 thereof, entered into force for the

United Arab Emirates on the date of deposit of its instrument of accession.

Washington, December 16, 2024
